scale.description: Multiply block coords by m_per_block values to get real-world metres. Sea level = block Y 62. Pixels 0–61 = ocean depth, pixels 62–127 = land elevation.

notes: Dual normalisation: pixels 0–61 = ocean depth (0=deepest, 61=near-surface), pixel 62 = coast/sea level, pixels 62–127 = land elevation
Output is 8-bit grayscale (mode L) without alpha channel
Spawn coordinates are pixel-to-block (X=col, Z=row); Y is approximate surface
Designed for WorldPainter heightmap import with linear mapping
